title: Touch them with your heart — single-line people-first manifesto (Mar 5, 2025)
html:
Touch them with your heart — single-line people-first manifesto

Source: 2025-03-05 Apple Note titled "." (period). One sentence. Written four days after the Peacock Bar incident — placement matters more than content.

TL;DR

  • "Every person you meet, touch them with your heart. Be genuine and loving. Be with beautiful people, help others. The people are everything." — the entire note.
  • Timing: written 96 hours after the Peacock taser-and-handcuffs night. The instruction is "be with beautiful people" — implicit subtraction of the un-beautiful ones.
  • A specimen of manifesto style note in its shortest possible form — single-line, second-person-implicit, designed as a re-read trigger.
  • Pairs directly with the March 15 "life feels heavy" note 10 days later — same manifesto-pivot mechanism, same "people are everything" axis.
  • Contrasts the post-Sam isolation with the April 20 gratitude list six weeks later — three-stage arc: incident → axiom → audit.

Key quote

"The people are everything."

Pattern observed

This is Yahir's manifesto style note used as post-incident reset. Same mechanism as the Shanghai 14 bullet manifesto but compressed to one sentence. The shorter the manifesto, the more recently he was knocked off-axis.

Open questions

  • Did this reset hold? The March 15 note suggests the heaviness returned within 10 days.
  • "Beautiful people" — does this name the curation that drives the Austin move six months later (i.e., a deliberate friend-pool reset)?

Related

  • 2025 03 15 life feels heavy
  • 2025 04 20 people i am indebted to for helping me
